channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-16
item.description:
Our open-source research community has seen significant progress across multiple projects. Notably, the `statcheck` and `escicheck` projects have made updates to their respective branches, with `statcheck` integrating changes from its remote repository and `escicheck` synchronizing with the `escicheckapp` repository. Meanwhile, the `oddpub` project has improved its ontogenerator's reuse and reference detection capabilities, and `docpluck` has addressed several issues, including rendering and documentation updates. Additionally, `coarse` has re-enabled Fable 5 in its model picker, and `regcheck` has fixed several bugs and updated its demo page. These connections between projects demonstrate the community's collaborative spirit and commitment to advancing open-source research tools. With new features and fixes being added regularly, our community continues to thrive and push the boundaries of what is possible in research and development.

39 commits across 3 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: statcheck, oddpub

Most active:

regcheck25 commits
metacheck11 commits
oddpub3 commits

item.title: metacheck: 7 commits today
item.description:
scienceverse/metacheck

The main branch saw several changes, including a fix to "honor standalone report opt-ins" and another to "install Quarto for target architecture". Additionally, the main branch had its Plumber version pinned to 1.3.3 "for upload guard", and its CI configuration was updated to "gate image publication on HTTP API tests". The main branch also received fixes to "harden plumber upload handling" and to "handle papers without t or F tests". The data_check branch was also worked on, where changes were made to "process jasp files, better study categorization, better scale extraction", as described by Lakens.

7 commit(s) today:

  • 4ea9250 [main] fix: honor standalone report opt-ins — Jakub Werner
  • 081413e [main] build: pin Plumber 1.3.3 for upload guard — Jakub Werner
  • 9c7ba25 [main] ci: gate image publication on HTTP API tests — Jakub Werner
  • 0e6a41f [main] fix: install Quarto for target architecture — Jakub Werner
  • 79d90b4 [main] fix: harden plumber upload handling — Jakub Werner
  • 4916d9c [main] fix: handle papers without t or F tests — Jakub Werner
  • b20f1f6 [main] Merge pinned plumber and validated-module line — Jakub Werner
  • 0a34c42 [data_check] process jasp files, better study categorization, better scale extraction. — Lakens
  • a4b8270 [data_check] additions — Lakens
  • 69afca1 [data_check] The OpenScales OSD export now exists end-to-end. Work spanned three files: — Lakens
  • 0291d57 [main] feat: default to validated metacheck modules — Jakub Werner
  • c799dcf [data_check] improve cache, keep original data, better hardcoded folders — Lakens
  • 0c8303d [data_check] fix bugs, add archive report, gate large github repos, improve feedback — Lakens
  • 2615ab2 [data_check] updates osf download — Lakens
  • 58122ed [data_check] updates to functions, fix bugs — Lakens
  • ad4cb14 [data_check] improvements — Lakens
  • a73d52a [jw_llm_fixes] fix(llm): correct ollama-native gate (&& not %%); fail-fast param/model checks — Jakub Werner
  • d99956e [jw_plumber_bibr_api] feat(plumber): bibr-JSON REST API — validated uploads, HTML report, hardened runtime — Jakub Werner
  • 4daee8c [jw_bibr_read_passthrough] feat(read): let bibr abstract and figure/table captions flow through — Jakub Werner
  • 00d98b8 [jw_grobid_text_fix] fix(grobid): stop anchor normalization from corrupting paper text — Jakub Werner

View all commits →

item.title: statcheck: activity update
item.description:
MicheleNuijten/statcheck

The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was worked on, where a merge was performed from the same branch of the `https://github.com/MicheleNuijten/statcheck` repository. The merge commit was made to integrate changes from the remote repository into the local `feature-non-apa-newer` branch. Additionally, on the same `feature-non-apa-newer` branch, "admin updates" were made, as per the commit message. No other branches were modified in this set of commits. The changes were made by MicheleNuijten.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →

item.title: oddpub: 1 commit today
item.description:
quest-bih/oddpub

The `main` branch was worked on, where the ontogenerator was modified to "improved reuse and upon request, references detection", indicating changes to how the ontogenerator handles reuse and detects references. No other branches were updated in this set of commits. The ontogenerator's reuse functionality was improved, and its ability to detect references was enhanced to occur upon request. The commit does not specify what other parts of the repository were changed, only the ontogenerator on the `main` branch. No new features, fixes, or modules beyond the ontogenerator were added in this set of commits.

1 commit(s) today:

  • 2b600f3 [main] improved reuse and upon request, references detection — ontogenerator
  • 52e8aeb [main] no_new_code statements — ontogenerator
  • f2850fe [main] debugging open data detection db 2023-2024 — ontogenerator

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →
